name: PR-quality eval gate output includes a per-PR breakdown listing each grade's usefulness rating and useful boolean
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus/grades && for i in $(seq 1 20); do printf '{"pr":%d,"graded_useful":true,"usefulness":4}\n' "$i" > pr-corpus/grades/p${i}.json; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/quality-eval.sh" --grades-dir pr-corpus/grades --out pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --include-breakdown 2>err.txt && grep -q '"per_pr"' pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && [ "$(grep -o '"pr":' pr-corpus/quality-eval.json | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" = "20" ] && echo ok 1>&2
